name: ask-llm-mcp
description: Unified MCP server for multi-LLM consultation — Gemini, Codex, and more. Automatically detects installed CLI tools and exposes only available providers.

tools.name: ask-gemini
tools.description: Send a prompt to Google Gemini CLI (requires gemini CLI installed)

tools.name: ask-codex
tools.description: Send a prompt to OpenAI Codex CLI (requires codex CLI installed)

tools.name: ping
tools.description: Test connectivity with the MCP server
